# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api-gateway
        image: api-gateway:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: auth-service
        image: auth-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: payment-service
        image: payment-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi

    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1

      labels:

        version: v1

        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"

    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notification-service

    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1

    metadata:
      labels:

        version: v1

        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"

      containers:

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: inventory-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: inventory-service
        image: inventory-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
